summary: Comprehensive testing of AlphaAI Fund Platform new features completed. Strategy Lab, Risk Management Engine, Capital Allocation Engine, Execution Optimization Layer, and Paper Trading Sandbox all functional. Backend API success rate: 97% (32/33 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with all new features working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Requires query parameters instead of JSON body for symbol, amount, side
minor_bugs.impact: API design inconsistency but functionality works when called correctly

passed_tests: Strategy Lab page loads with strategies list
Generate new strategy button works and creates strategies
Strategy pipeline shows accurate counts for each stage
Strategy rankings table displays with proper sorting
Backtest, Sandbox, Deploy buttons work on strategy cards
Paper Trading toggle on Dashboard functions correctly
Paper trade execution works with real-time P&L calculation
Risk status panel displays on Agents page with live metrics
Execution stats panel shows optimization metrics
AI Market Analysis generates comprehensive reports
Wallet connection and demo mode working
Fund statistics and performance charts loading
Real-time data updates across all components
